data.body: Adversarial review (preplanning Phase 2.5): red-team (opus) surfaced 13 findings; blue-team (sonnet) accepted 7, rejected 6. Accepted findings applied to stories ba7d-729d (S1), 7bcf-3692 (S2), 8630-b04e (S3), e096-1808 (S4), 4199-c881 (S5), 0446-a7cc (S6). Artifact: /tmp/adversarial-review-f7d5-59e4.json. Rejected findings: tie-breaker spec (#2, single-story internal), LLM concurrency fairness (#3, single-story internal), reproducibility new-story (#6, speculative umbrella), security-hardening new-story (#9, no user-controlled input path), derivative S7 docs (#11, rejected upstream), derivative S7 dep (#13, vacuous).
